channel.title: Dimension 20 Live
channel.description: Latest releases from Dimension 20 Live on Dropout.tv

item.title: Dimension 20 Live: Viva Más Vegas
item.description:
The crew of the Wurst returns and they’re all in. Live from the MGM Grand.

Duration: 2:14:06

Tags: Dimension 20 Live, A Starstruck Odyssey, space, spaceships, comics, conspiracies, tabletop rpg, role playing, magic, dungeons and dragons, RPG, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: Dimension 20 Live: Viva Más Vegas Trailer
item.description:
The crew of the Wurst returns and they’re all in. New special premieres March 11th.

Duration: 00:56

Tags: Dimension 20 Live, A Starstruck Odyssey, space, spaceships, comics, conspiracies, tabletop rpg, role playing, magic, dungeons and dragons, RPG, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan
